svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(183, 228, 244), rgb(17, 56, 70)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 0, 0), rgb(255, 218, 218));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 20px; height: 1px; padding-top: 157px; margin-left: 69px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(67, 141, 213), rgb(70, 134, 196)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
